positive: An ultra-minimalist, stylized illustration featuring a majestic group of forest animals—deer, foxes, and owls—in a dense, enchanted forest setting. The style is neo-vintage woodland folklore, rendered with clean, bold linework and sophisticated, limited color palette (deep emerald, antique gold, sapphire blue, and sepia). The central composition features the animals grouped around a glowing, stylized crescent moon and intertwined forest vines. The background should be suggestive but non-distracting, utilizing strong negative space for print versatility. The overall aesthetic must evoke wonder and natural mystery, suitable for high-quality t-shirt printing, maximizing silhouette visibility and contrast.
negative: blurry, low detail, text, watermark, logo, artifact, poorly rendered, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, cartoon, photorealism, clutter, graffiti
